expectations.text: Generated SKILL.md contains both 'name:' and 'description:' YAML frontmatter fields
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md opens with '---' on line 1. Verified by byte-level od -c dump confirming '- - - \n' with no preceding characters. PASS.

expectations.text: A hard STOP gate exists before AI produces any recommendations or conclusions
expectations.evidence: 'Stop if AI includes causal language in any output ("because", "due to", "driven by")' and 'Stop if AI writes a "key takeaway", "headline finding", or "executive summary" framing' — explicit enforcement in working-agreements.md intervention triggers.

expectations.text: working-agreements.md explicitly separates what AI executes from what human owns
expectations.evidence: working-agreements.md has distinct 'Human Owns (Non-Negotiable)' and 'AI Executes (With Review Gates)' sections confirmed present.

expectations.text: SKILL.md description contains domain-specific terms like 'churn', 'SaaS', 'cohort', or 'data analysis'
expectations.evidence: Description: 'Guides monthly SaaS customer churn analysis — pulling cohort data...' Contains 'SaaS', 'churn', 'cohort'.

expectations.text: working-agreements.md contains 'STOP' with at least one specific trigger condition
expectations.evidence: 3 'Stop if AI...' conditions including causal language prohibition, cohort boundary redefinition, and framing headline findings.

expectations.text: After-generation instructions include /skill-creator as a validation step before production use
expectations.evidence: Agent delivered: 'Validate with /skill-creator before using in production. It will verify the SKILL.md format, confirm the description triggers correctly, and run with-skill vs. without-skill eval comparisons. A skill that hasn't been through eval is an untested assumption.'

expectations.text: SKILL.md description contains domain-specific terms like 'client', 'report', 'weekly', or 'status'
expectations.evidence: Description contains 'weekly client status report production for consulting firms'.

expectations.text: working-agreements.md contains 'STOP' with at least one specific trigger condition
expectations.evidence: 3 'Stop if AI...' conditions: sending without account lead approval, listing risk without source, writing resourcing recommendations without approval.

expectations.text: A gate specifically around the account lead review or risks section exists in phase-prompts.md or working-agreements.md
expectations.evidence: 'The send decision: the account lead must explicitly approve the report before it is sent' and 'Every recommendation: AI may draft candidate language, but the account lead must' — explicit, named gates in working-agreements.md.

expectations.text: working-agreements.md explicitly lists editorial approval or final sign-off as human-owned (not just implied)
expectations.evidence: 'Approving editorial voice and tone in all show notes and social posts before they proceed' listed under Human Owns. Explicit, not implied.

expectations.text: Audio editing is identified as non-delegable to AI in working-agreements.md
expectations.evidence: 'Deciding whether any audio segment is broadcast-quality or must be cut' listed under Human Owns. Framed as editorial judgment that cannot be delegated.

expectations.text: working-agreements.md contains 'STOP' with at least one specific trigger condition
expectations.evidence: 3 'Stop if AI...' conditions: publishing without host approval, drafting non-verbatim quotes in social content, selecting key insights without host confirmation.

expectations.text: phase-prompts.md contains specific descriptions of what 'analysis done' and 'execution done' look like for this domain
expectations.evidence: PLAN: 'Done when: Host has reviewed raw transcript, selected 3-5 key insights, confirmed episode angle and framing, and approved the production plan.' DO: 'Done when: All draft assets exist... and the host has a complete review package assembled.' Specific and verifiable.
